headline: Meituan's 1.6T-parameter LongCat-2.0 open-weights MoE leads a window dominated by Chinese model releases and open-source momentum.
body: Meituan released LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with sparse attention that activates roughly 48 billion parameters per token, trained on AI ASIC superpods and being uploaded to Hugging Face. Commentary frames a broader shift toward Chinese models on cost and data sovereignty grounds, and toward a rapidly closing gap between open-source and frontier systems. Separately, AI startups including Wix-owned Base44 are building proprietary models for defensibility, while context-management tooling such as Open Memory Protocol breaks out with a unified memory store spanning Claude, ChatGPT, and other assistants.
